reason: Big firm (global real-estate services) + verify-YOE range + a real geo restriction = Jamie's judgment call. Built to submit-ready, held for her review per task instruction.

jd_verify.yoe_required: Minimum of 3-6 years in human resources
jd_verify.yoe_verdict: BUILD — 3yr floor is within Jamie's ~3yr band (≤~5yr stretch cap); NOT a 5+ hard floor
jd_verify.sponsorship_clause: SILENT — no no-sponsorship / no citizenship / no ITAR clause present. Not a DROP.
jd_verify.location: Remote - US, BUT must live in the Philadelphia area or neighboring PA states; role based in Reading, PA; 20% local travel.
jd_verify.geo_flag: Jamie is in Portland, OR. This role is remote-but-region-locked to the Philadelphia/PA area — a personal-fit question, NOT an H-1B or YOE blocker. The 'remote' label passes the geo gate; surfaced here for Jamie's decision.

tailoring_angle: HR/HRBP recipe. Summary identity = 'Human Resources'; Vestas leads its M&A bullet with employee-relations + compliance (matches JD's ER/investigations + DEI/M&A scope, source-exact verbs, no role-upgrade); NextGen reworded to 'engagement and performance strategies' + retains DEI/Inclusive-Leadership/performance-review; InGenius -> 'people-development programs' + 'management webinars'; Kronos keeps performance-management + comp foundation; skills foreground HRIS/ATS/Data-Analysis with Excel+PowerPoint explicit (JD asks advanced Excel/PowerPoint). Spanish (basic) truthful (JD: Spanish strongly preferred). NO Workday/ServiceNow added (Jamie lacks them).

quality.gate_chain: ALL 11 GATES PASS (exit 0): eligibility, tailored-resume, resume-rules, mojibake, markup-leak, recency-order, client-word, substance-floor, cover-format, cover-structure, pdf-matches-source
quality.visual_verify: resume.pdf = 1 page (autofit font_scale 0.97, content preserved per RULE -1); no bullet orphan-wrap; no markup leak; ODN named correctly; Spanish present; no fabricated tools. cover_letter.pdf = 1 page, canonical skeleton intact.
quality.substance_floor: All canonical concretes preserved vs base resume.json.
quality.fabrication_check: RULE 0 clean — every claim traces to resume.json / content_library.md; no invented tools or numbers.

fit_note: Textbook HR/HRBP generalist (talent reviews, performance mgmt, engagement, DEI, ER) — strong real-experience match across Vestas HRBP, NextGen, ODN, Kronos. Title says 'Senior' but duties are IC-generalist, not people-management; 3yr floor = stretchable. Main open question for Jamie is the Philadelphia-area residency requirement.
